name: @skills-sec/scanner
description: Core scanning engine for Skills Security Scanner

scripts.build: tsc && node scripts/fix-esm-extensions.js && node --input-type=module -e "import{readdirSync,mkdirSync,copyFileSync}from'fs';const src='src/rules/core',dst='dist/rules/core';mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')).forEach(f=>copyFileSync(src+'/'+f,dst+'/'+f));console.log('Copied rule files')"
